art_brief: A large luna moth as the dominant subject in a bold art deco botanical idiom, its wings spanning most of the frame, spread symmetrically and brushing the fanned leaves on either side, filling the frame edge to edge in bold filled shapes, deep green and mustard on cream.
go_hold_kill_rationale: Bestseller-badge fauna listings render the creature large and symmetric as the focal subject; exercises the FM-7 integration fix with a large, contact-touching, anatomically complete occupant.

art_brief: One oversized poppy bloom as the dominant subject in a mid-century modern botanical idiom, large enough to read across a room, resting against a soft terracotta arch that sits behind and touches its petals, generous calm space around it, bold filled petals, sage and dusty pink accents.
go_hold_kill_rationale: Badge listings sell one oversized bloom in generous empty space with a shape behind a large subject; tests the owner's sparse ruling plus the calibrated backdrop-device reintroduction.

art_brief: A wildflower meadow in a soft cottagecore botanical idiom, slender stems rooted at and running off the bottom edge, blooms of varied heights filling the width, painted in confident medium-weight lines, olive and dusty pink blossoms scattered across a warm cream ground.
go_hold_kill_rationale: Wildflower-meadow bestsellers consistently root stems at the bottom edge with no margin; directly targets FM-9 grounding on a stem-native niche in the softer painterly lane.

art_brief: A mid-century modern desert landscape reduced to one bold dominant mesa, a burnt orange sun disc resting behind and touching the peak, wide calm empty sky above, bold filled flat shapes meeting cleanly at the bottom edge, teal and burnt orange layered low on the horizon.
go_hold_kill_rationale: Minimalist-landscape bestsellers pair an empty atmospheric field with a clean sun disc; the second calibrated backdrop-device brief, behind a large dominant subject per the sparse ruling.

art_brief: Dense full-frame foliage in a bold cut-paper collage idiom, thick bold filled leaf shapes tiling the whole frame edge to edge, two small swallows sweeping through in mid-flight with wings open and symmetric, olive and terracotta leaves on a cream ground.
go_hold_kill_rationale: Dense full-frame cut-paper botanicals carry badges with no backdrop, and small fauna sells only in motion; tests the dense lane plus airborne secondary-subject integration with symmetric wings.
